utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 5 items in the required format: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. The final coverage plan includes all five sections. Now check if each is fully specified with all details and costs: 1) health_coverage: contains descriptions plus monthly and annual costs—fully specified. 2) property_coverage: includes coverage details and monthly/annual costs—fully specified. 3) travel_coverage: includes coverage details and monthly/annual costs—fully specified. 4) additional_services: includes listed services and monthly/annual costs—fully specified. 5) total_budget: includes monthly/annual totals and extra budget details—fully specified. Therefore, all 5/5 items are included and specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final plan mentions specific plan names and services. We map each mentioned item to the corresponding ground-truth entry. Health physical and mental both use LifeFirst Standard Plan. Property home contents uses LifeFirst Standard Coverage. Golf equipment maps to Gaming Equipment Coverage. Business equipment maps to Home Office Protection. Technology protection maps to Technology Protection. Travel business travel uses LifeFirst Standard Plan under travel_insurance. Travel assistance maps to 24/7 Travel Assistance. Business support maps to Business Travel Support. Additional services include executive liability (not in ratings), premium membership aligns with Premium Insurance Membership, and portfolio management aligns with Insurance Portfolio Management.
